positive: A minimalist and highly stylized portrait of a whimsical astronaut floating in deep space. The astronaut is depicted with a clean, streamlined, retro-futuristic suit (chrome and muted teal accents). They are holding a bouquet of glowing, bioluminescent flowers. The background is a deep indigo nebula with subtle constellations. The art style is a perfect blend of Mid-Century Modern illustration and clean vector graphics, featuring bold outlines, high contrast, and limited, sophisticated color palettes (teal, gold, navy, white). Central composition, perfectly suited for screen printing on apparel, evoking a sense of calm wonder and cosmic exploration. Dramatic, even lighting, high resolution, clean lines, designed for textile printing.
